title: alyssum globosum
intro: Alyssum globosum, also known as sweet alyssum or sweet candytuft, is a type of flowering plant native to Europe, Asia, and North Africa. Traditionally, Alyssum globosum has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been used to treat wounds and skin irritations. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing anxiety and promoting relaxation due to its calming effects, as well as aiding in digestion and relieving symptoms of colds and flu. Alyssum globosum can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, and is often used in aromatherapy to promote a sense of calm and well-being.
